Information Systems and Technology

MENU

Established in 2004, the Department of
Information Systems and Technologies at Okan University will continue its
educational activities from the 2004 - 2005 academic year at the Akfırat
Campus, featuring a robust computer network infrastructure, state-of-the-art
computer laboratories, and fully equipped classrooms.

The Department of Information Systems and Technologies at Okan University aims to cultivate skilled and innovative individuals capable of adapting to the rapidly evolving dynamics of the information world. With a modern curriculum designed to meet the demands of the contemporary era, the department welcomes its students.

Our educational process, supported by a robust IT infrastructure, up-to-date computer laboratories, and fully equipped classrooms, provides students with an environment where they can apply theoretical knowledge in practice. The program is designed with consideration of current trends in information technologies, the expectations of the business world, and the needs of the industry, and is led by experts in the field.

Starting from the third year, our students are encouraged to work on real-world projects, which allows them to reinforce their theoretical knowledge and gain industry experience. We believe that our graduates will stand out in the information technology sector with their analytical thinking skills, software development expertise, and knowledge of system management.

Our curriculum is designed to integrate theoretical and practical knowledge and is continuously updated in parallel with technological developments and current requirements. Within the framework of the 'Career Preparation' and 'Internship' programs, our students are encouraged to complete mandatory or voluntary internships. Additionally, in addition to domestic and international internship opportunities, part-time work opportunities are also available.
